not_promoted: Template only; actual VS Code registry-provider smoke evidence has not been produced.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove a clean VS Code profile/workspace.
command_template: Create clean VS Code profile and confirm no Eve MCP config.
Open VS Code channel docs/listing path and confirm install_source=vscode.

install_or_import.purpose: Apply Eve MCP config through the VS Code provider path.
command_template: Run Eve client VS Code install/apply from a clean profile and confirm eve-memory config.

connect.purpose: Connect VS Code to Eve MCP.
command_template: Complete VS Code MCP auth/connect and verify connectivity.

store.purpose: Store a smoke memory from VS Code.
command_template: Use VS Code Eve MCP to store ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read the smoke memory from VS Code.
command_template: Use VS Code Eve MCP to read ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the smoke memory from VS Code.
command_template: Use VS Code Eve MCP to forget ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.
Trigger and verify connector.install.completed for vscode.
Remove Eve MCP from VS Code and verify config is absent.
